title: Uncrossed Lines
hints: Notice that connecting matching elements without crossing preserves their relative order in both arrays.
This structure matches the Longest Common Subsequence problem, which is typically solved using dynamic programming.
Define dp[i][j] as the answer for A[:i] and B[:j]. If A[i-1]==B[j-1], add 1 to dp[i-1][j-1]; otherwise take the max of skipping one element from A or B.
